Propagation guidée des ondes \
[Raoux - Poly de cours L3-1.pdf](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26059163/Raoux.-.Poly.de.cours.L3-1.pdf) \
https://bupdoc.udppc.asso.fr/consultation/article-bup.php?ID_fiche=23379 \

[prop_guidee.ipynb](https://github.com/user-attachments/files/26457846/prop_guidee.ipynb)
{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 7,
   "id": "9aa2541b-fbd7-4484-9992-3f57912ca9eb",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "name": "stderr",
     "output_type": "stream",
     "text": [
      "C:\\Users\\alexandre.antezak\\AppData\\Local\\Temp\\ipykernel_8080\\2633737240.py:7: RuntimeWarning: invalid value encountered in sqrt\n",
      "  return np.sqrt(omega**2 - ((n*np.pi)/2)**2 - ((m*np.pi)/3)**2)\n"
     ]
    },
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 640x480 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "\n",
    "omega = np.linspace(0,5,10000)\n",
    "\n",
    "def disp(omega,n,m):\n",
    "    return np.sqrt(omega**2 - ((n*np.pi)/2)**2 - ((m*np.pi)/3)**2)\n",
    "\n",
    "plt.plot(omega, disp(omega,0,0), label=r'$k_{z} = \\frac{\\omega}{\\mathrm{c}}$', color=\"black\", linestyle='dashed')    \n",
    "plt.plot(omega, disp(omega,1,0), label=\"n=1, m=0\")\n",
    "plt.plot(omega, disp(omega,0,1), label=\"n=0, m=1\")\n",
    "plt.plot(omega, disp(omega,1,1), label=\"n=1, m=1\")\n",
    "plt.plot(omega, disp(omega,2,0), label=\"n=2, m=0\")\n",
    "plt.plot(omega, disp(omega,0,2), label=\"n=0, m=2\")\n",
    "plt.plot([2.5,2.5],[0,5.1], c=\"black\")\n",
    "plt.grid()\n",
    "plt.legend()\n",
    "plt.ylabel(r'$k_z$', fontsize=20)\n",
    "plt.xlabel(r'$\\frac{\\omega}{\\mathrm{c}}$', fontsize=20)\n",
    "plt.show()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "b0230afd-8c0c-4f14-8035-fb6620e0afe7",
